text:
On Sun, 29 Jan 2012 19:08:10 +0200, Kevin Oberman <rkoberman@gmail.com> wrote:

> It would appear that you failed to follow the instructions in
> /usr/ports/UPDATING:

Indeed, I failed, thanks for noting it fast. I was checking if the instructions help
when your message came in. Well, it does help.

Please close the PR.

(Now I wonder how I missed the entry in UPDATING - I did look for it. But that's my own problem.)

Thank you and please excuse me for noise,
Vladimir
